final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-concept
Asset type: character illustration, scene redesign
Primary request: transform existing image into cel-shaded thick paint anime style, rearrange items to a more suitable scene, and add a cel-shaded thick paint style girl facing the viewer
Scene/backdrop: elegant interior scene suitable for western-style light makeup beauty aesthetic, soft ambient setting
Subject: western-style light makeup beauty girl with delicate features, natural soft makeup, elegant hairstyle, facing the viewer directly
Style/medium: cel-shaded thick paint anime style, セルルック厚塗り, vibrant anime illustration with painterly depth
Composition/framing: balanced two-character composition with girl facing viewer, items repositioned for visual harmony
Lighting/mood: soft diffused lighting, romantic and elegant atmosphere
Color palette: warm skin tones, soft pastel accents, rich cel-shaded colors with depth
Materials/textures: smooth cel-shaded surfaces with thick paint texture, glossy hair, soft fabric folds
Constraints: maintain cel-shaded thick paint style throughout, girl must face viewer, items must be repositioned to better scene layout
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, flat thin cel-shading without paint depth, cluttered composition, eastern makeup style
